Next change: for both add and edit client ... move the #4 claimant name -- to #1 first position where the policy number is; Then re-number the sequence (if needed)  Here's the sequence of inputs and their labels on the add client page (`session-header.component.html`):  1. **Claim #** (line 75-82) -- `clientTemp.claimNumber`, max 25 chars 2. **Claim Date*** (line 86-91) -- `clientTemp.claimDate`, date input 3. **Cause of loss*** (line 96-101) -- `clientTemp.headline`, max 25 chars, placeholder "Brief desc" 4. **Claimant Name*** (line 106-111) -- `clientTemp.businessName`, max 20 chars 5. **Insurable Interest** (line 117-278) -- contains:    - **Subject** (line 142-152) -- `clientTemp.claimTypes`, dropdown    - **Structure Type*** (line 158-174) -- `clientTemp.lastName`, dropdown    - **Bldg*** (line 188-200) -- `clientTemp.BldgNumber`, dropdown (only for Real Estate)  Fields marked with `*` are required.
